title: Guide to Te Marautanga o Aotearoa – Tau 9 to 10 - Ministry of Education
content:
## Guide to Te Marautanga o Aotearoa – Tau 9 to 10
This guide to sets out what mokopuna and rangatahi are learning at kura each year, and how you and your whānau can support them to achieve.
- Guide to Te Marautanga o Aotearoa – Tau 9 to 10
- Tau 9 – Te Marautanga o Aotearoa
- Tau 10 – Te Marautanga o Aotearoa
We’re inviting whānau to share their feedback on the Parent Portal to help us improve the information and support we provide. Take a few minutes to complete our short survey.
Parent Portal survey – Survey Monkey

## Understanding what mokopuna and rangatahi learn #
The Parent Portal is a collection of guidance and resources for whānau.
This year–by–year learning guide covers Te Marautanga o Aotearoa and currently covers Tau 9 to 10. We'll be adding more soon.
The guide is structured by year level. Find the level of your mokopuna. Within that section, you will find ways to understand what they do at kura, and how you can support them to achieve what they need to this year.
- Tau 9 – Te Marautanga o Aotearoa Each year, rangatahi build their learning. Here is some helpful information to support their learning in Te Reo Rangatira and Pāngarau. Find out more

### Tau 9 – Te Marautanga o Aotearoa
Each year, rangatahi build their learning. Here is some helpful information to support their learning in Te Reo Rangatira and Pāngarau.
- Tau 10 – Te Marautanga o Aotearoa Understand what your child will have learned by Tau 10 at kura, plus guidance on ways you can help them progress their learning at home. Find out more

### Tau 10 – Te Marautanga o Aotearoa
Understand what your child will have learned by Tau 10 at kura, plus guidance on ways you can help them progress their learning at home.
